self_report.correct_answer: ((2n-1)/e)^((2n-1)/2) < 1·3·5···(2n-1) < ((2n+1)/e)^((2n+1)/2) holds for all positive integers n.
self_report.numeric_verdict: At n=1: 0.6065 < 1 < 1.1594; at n=3: 4.5887 < 15 < 27.404; at n=5: 218.66 < 945 < 2182.9 — both inequalities hold in the asserted direction at every tested n (1..8).
self_report.notes: This is the standard Putnam 1996 B-2; the inequalities follow from comparing log((2k-1)!!) with the integral of log(x) and have a classic proof.
